clotho-core/src/domain/entities/capture..name: Meeting

clotho-core/src/domain/entities/capture..doc_comment:
Container entity for a meeting occurrence.

Has associated Transcript and/or Notes. Carries date, attendees, and
related entity references.

clotho-core/src/domain/entities/capture..name: Transcript
clotho-core/src/domain/entities/capture..signature: { id: EntityId, title: String, created_at: DateTime<Utc>, updated_at: DateTime<Utc>, tags: Vec<Tag>, content: String, me...
clotho-core/src/domain/entities/capture..doc_comment:
Raw meeting content, typically from a transcription service.

Source for AI extraction. Belongs to exactly one Meeting.

clotho-core/src/domain/entities/capture..name: Note
clotho-core/src/domain/entities/capture..signature: { id: EntityId, title: String, created_at: DateTime<Utc>, updated_at: DateTime<Utc>, tags: Vec<Tag>, content: String, me...
clotho-core/src/domain/entities/capture..doc_comment:
Authored content, freeform.

Can belong to a Meeting or stand alone.

clotho-core/src/domain/entities/capture..name: Reflection
clotho-core/src/domain/entities/capture..signature: { id: EntityId, title: String, created_at: DateTime<Utc>, updated_at: DateTime<Utc>, tags: Vec<Tag>, content: String, pe...
clotho-core/src/domain/entities/capture..doc_comment:
Time-period bound thinking.

Period types: daily, weekly, monthly, quarterly, adhoc.
May relate to Programs for scoped reflection.

clotho-core/src/domain/entities/capture..name: new
clotho-core/src/domain/entities/capture..signature:
(
        title: impl Into<String>,
        period_type: PeriodType,
        period_start: DateTime<Utc>,
        period_end: DateTime<Utc>,
    ) -> Self

clotho-core/src/domain/entities/capture..name: Artifact
clotho-core/src/domain/entities/capture..signature: { id: EntityId, title: String, created_at: DateTime<Utc>, updated_at: DateTime<Utc>, tags: Vec<Tag>, content: String, so...
clotho-core/src/domain/entities/capture..doc_comment:
Deliverable with external source link.

Examples: design docs, PRs, presentations, shipped features.
Ingested as markdown with link to original.

clotho-core/src/domain/entities/capture..name: new
clotho-core/src/domain/entities/capture..signature: (title: impl Into<String>, source_url: impl Into<String>) -> Self

clotho-core/src/domain/entities/derived..doc_comment: Open question requiring resolution, extracted from transcripts.

clotho-core/src/domain/entities/derived..signature: (title: impl Into<String>, confidence: f32, source_span: Option<SourceSpan>) -> Self

clotho-core/src/domain/entities/derived..name: Insight
clotho-core/src/domain/entities/derived..signature: { id: EntityId, title: String, created_at: DateTime<Utc>, updated_at: DateTime<Utc>, extraction_status: ExtractionStatus...
clotho-core/src/domain/entities/derived..doc_comment: Learning or observation worth preserving, extracted from transcripts.

clotho-core/src/domain/entities/derived..name: draft
clotho-core/src/domain/entities/derived..signature: (title: impl Into<String>, confidence: f32, source_span: Option<SourceSpan>) -> Self

clotho-core/src/domain/entities/executio.name: Workstream
clotho-core/src/domain/entities/executio.signature: { id: EntityId, title: String, created_at: DateTime<Utc>, updated_at: DateTime<Utc>, status: Status, tags: Vec<Tag>, con...
clotho-core/src/domain/entities/executio.doc_comment: Long-running work thread. May relate to Programs or Responsibilities.

clotho-core/src/domain/entities/executio.name: Task
clotho-core/src/domain/entities/executio.signature: { id: EntityId, title: String, created_at: DateTime<Utc>, updated_at: DateTime<Utc>, state: TaskState, tags: Vec<Tag>, c...
clotho-core/src/domain/entities/executio.doc_comment:
Discrete work item with a state machine lifecycle.

Valid transitions:
- Todo → Doing
- Doing → Blocked, Done
- Blocked → Doing
- Done is terminal

clotho-core/src/domain/entities/person.r.name: Person
clotho-core/src/domain/entities/person.r.signature: { id: EntityId, name: String, email: Option<String>, created_at: DateTime<Utc>, updated_at: DateTime<Utc>, tags: Vec<Tag...
clotho-core/src/domain/entities/person.r.doc_comment:
Lightweight rolodex entry for people.

Used for entity resolution during AI extraction (fuzzy matching on name/email).
Notes are stored as markdown content.

clotho-core/src/domain/entities/structur.name: Program
clotho-core/src/domain/entities/structur.signature: { id: EntityId, title: String, created_at: DateTime<Utc>, updated_at: DateTime<Utc>, status: Status, tags: Vec<Tag>, con...
clotho-core/src/domain/entities/structur.doc_comment:
Strategic initiative with explicit objectives.

Examples: technical education, PMO establishment, monolith breakup.

clotho-core/src/domain/entities/structur.name: Responsibility
clotho-core/src/domain/entities/structur.signature: { id: EntityId, title: String, created_at: DateTime<Utc>, updated_at: DateTime<Utc>, status: Status, tags: Vec<Tag>, con...
clotho-core/src/domain/entities/structur.doc_comment:
Ongoing role obligation that never "completes".

Examples: team mentorship, HR reporting, budget management, 1:1s.

clotho-core/src/domain/entities/structur.name: Objective
clotho-core/src/domain/entities/structur.signature: { id: EntityId, title: String, created_at: DateTime<Utc>, updated_at: DateTime<Utc>, status: Status, tags: Vec<Tag>, con...
clotho-core/src/domain/entities/structur.doc_comment:
Outcome within a Program.

Belongs to exactly one Program.

clotho-core/src/domain/llm_types.rs.signature: Commit | Decide | Risk | Block | Question | Insight | Delegate | Request | Update
clotho-core/src/domain/llm_types.rs.doc_comment: Speech act classifications from transcript analysis.

clotho-core/src/domain/llm_types.rs.name: Extraction

clotho-core/src/domain/llm_types.rs.name: EntityMention
clotho-core/src/domain/llm_types.rs.signature: { raw_text: String, resolved_id: Option<EntityId>, resolved_type: Option<EntityType>, confidence: f32 }

clotho-core/src/domain/llm_types.rs.name: ExtractionRequest

clotho-core/src/domain/llm_types.rs.doc_comment: A known entity provided for extraction resolution context.

clotho-core/src/domain/llm_types.rs.name: ExtractionResult
clotho-core/src/domain/llm_types.rs.doc_comment: Result of extraction from a transcript.

clotho-core/src/domain/llm_types.rs.name: ExtractorError
clotho-core/src/domain/llm_types.rs.doc_comment:
live in clotho-extract/backends/.
These are trait definitions only — concrete implementations (Claude, Ollama, etc.)
Per CLO-A-0001 (trait-based LLM backend abstraction) and CLO-A-0003 (VSS).

LLM backend trait definitions and request/response types.

clotho-core/src/domain/llm_types.rs.name: Extractor
clotho-core/src/domain/llm_types.rs.doc_comment: Core trait for LLM-powered extraction from transcripts.

clotho-core/src/domain/llm_types.rs.name: SummaryRequest
clotho-core/src/domain/llm_types.rs.signature: { content: String, context: Option<String>, max_length: Option<usize> }
clotho-core/src/domain/llm_types.rs.doc_comment: Request to generate a summary from content.

clotho-core/src/domain/llm_types.rs.name: SummarizerError
clotho-core/src/domain/llm_types.rs.doc_comment:
live in clotho-extract/backends/.
These are trait definitions only — concrete implementations (Claude, Ollama, etc.)
Per CLO-A-0001 (trait-based LLM backend abstraction) and CLO-A-0003 (VSS).

LLM backend trait definitions and request/response types.

clotho-core/src/domain/llm_types.rs.name: ResolutionRequest
clotho-core/src/domain/llm_types.rs.signature: { mentions: Vec<EntityMention>, known_entities: Vec<KnownEntity>, context: String }
clotho-core/src/domain/llm_types.rs.doc_comment: Request to resolve ambiguous entity mentions.

clotho-core/src/domain/llm_types.rs.name: ResolvedMention
clotho-core/src/domain/llm_types.rs.signature: { original: EntityMention, resolved_id: Option<EntityId>, confidence: f32 }
clotho-core/src/domain/llm_types.rs.doc_comment: A single resolution result for one mention.

clotho-core/src/domain/llm_types.rs.doc_comment:
live in clotho-extract/backends/.
These are trait definitions only — concrete implementations (Claude, Ollama, etc.)
Per CLO-A-0001 (trait-based LLM backend abstraction) and CLO-A-0003 (VSS).

LLM backend trait definitions and request/response types.

clotho-core/src/domain/llm_types.rs.name: Resolver
clotho-core/src/domain/llm_types.rs.doc_comment: Core trait for LLM-assisted entity resolution.

clotho-core/src/domain/llm_types.rs.name: EmbedderError
clotho-core/src/domain/llm_types.rs.doc_comment:
live in clotho-extract/backends/.
These are trait definitions only — concrete implementations (Claude, Ollama, etc.)
Per CLO-A-0001 (trait-based LLM backend abstraction) and CLO-A-0003 (VSS).

LLM backend trait definitions and request/response types.

clotho-core/src/domain/llm_types.rs.name: Embedder
clotho-core/src/domain/llm_types.rs.doc_comment:
Core trait for generating vector embeddings from text.

Per CLO-A-0003: embeddings are stored in SQLite+VSS (index/vectors.db)
as a derived index for semantic similarity search.

clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.name: Relation
clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.signature: { source_id: EntityId, target_id: EntityId, relation_type: RelationType }
clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.doc_comment: A typed relation between two entities (domain-level view of a graph edge).

clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.name: RelationType
clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.signature: BelongsTo | RelatesTo | Delivers | SpawnedFrom | ExtractedFrom | HasDecision | HasRisk | BlockedBy | Mentions | HasCaden...

clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.name: Entity
clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.signature: { fn id(), fn entity_type(), fn title(), fn created_at(), fn updated_at() }

clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.name: Taskable
clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.signature: { fn state(), fn transition(), fn valid_transitions() }
clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.doc_comment:
Entities with task-like workflow state machine.

Valid transitions:
- Todo → Doing
- Doing → Blocked, Done
- Blocked → Doing
- Done is terminal

clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.name: Extractable
clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.signature: { fn extraction_status(), fn source_span(), fn confidence(), fn promote(), fn discard() }
clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.doc_comment:
Entities produced by AI extraction with a draft lifecycle.

Lifecycle: Draft → Promoted | Discarded (both terminal).

clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.name: Relatable
clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.doc_comment: Entities that participate in the relation graph.

clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.name: Taggable
clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.signature: { fn tags(), fn add_tag(), fn remove_tag() }

clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.name: ContentBearing
clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.signature: { fn content(), fn set_content(), fn content_path() }
clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.doc_comment: Entities with markdown content stored as files.

clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.name: HasCadence
clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.doc_comment: Entities with a recurring schedule (e.g., "weekly sync every Monday").

clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.name: HasDeadline
clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.doc_comment: Entities with a hard due date.

clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.name: HasSchedule
clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.doc_comment: Entities scheduled at a specific date/time.

clotho-core/src/domain/types.rs.name: EntityType
clotho-core/src/domain/types.rs.signature: Program | Responsibility | Objective | Workstream | Task | Meeting | Transcript | Note | Reflection | Artifact | Decisio...

clotho-core/src/domain/types.rs.name: SourceSpan
clotho-core/src/domain/types.rs.signature: { transcript_id: EntityId, start: usize, end: usize }
clotho-core/src/domain/types.rs.doc_comment: Reference to a span within a transcript.

clotho-core/src/domain/types.rs.name: Frequency
clotho-core/src/domain/types.rs.signature: Daily | Weekly | Biweekly | Monthly | Quarterly | Yearly | Custom

clotho-core/src/domain/types.rs.name: Cadence
clotho-core/src/domain/types.rs.signature: { frequency: Frequency, cron: Option<String>, label: Option<String>, next_occurrence: Option<DateTime<Utc>> }
clotho-core/src/domain/types.rs.doc_comment:
Recurring schedule metadata.

Stored on entity structs via the `HasCadence` trait AND materialized
as `HAS_CADENCE` graph edges for cross-entity temporal queries.

clotho-core/src/error.rs.name: TransitionError
clotho-core/src/error.rs.doc_comment: Error when an invalid task state transition is attempted.

clotho-core/src/error.rs.name: PromotionError
clotho-core/src/error.rs.doc_comment: Error when promoting a non-draft extraction.

clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.name: EdgeInfo
clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.signature: { source_id: EntityId, target_id: EntityId, relation_type: RelationType }
clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.doc_comment: Metadata about an edge in the graph.

clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.name: add_edge
clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.signature:
(
        &self,
        source: &EntityId,
        target: &EntityId,
        rel_type: RelationType,
    ) -> Result<(), GraphError>
clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.doc_comment:
Add a typed relation between two nodes.

Upserts — if the edge already exists, it's a no-op.

clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.name: add_edge_with_props
clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.signature:
(
        &self,
        source: &EntityId,
        target: &EntityId,
        rel_type: RelationType,
        props: Vec<(String, String)>,
    ) -> Result<(), GraphError>
clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.doc_comment: Add a typed relation with properties (for temporal edges, etc.).

clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.name: remove_edge
clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.signature:
(
        &self,
        source: &EntityId,
        target: &EntityId,
        rel_type: RelationType,
    ) -> Result<(), GraphError>
clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.doc_comment: Remove a typed relation between two nodes.

clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.name: has_edge
clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.signature:
(
        &self,
        source: &EntityId,
        target: &EntityId,
        rel_type: RelationType,
    ) -> Result<bool, GraphError>
clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.doc_comment: Check whether a typed relation exists between two nodes.

clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.name: get_edges_from
clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.doc_comment: Get all outgoing edges from a node.

clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.name: get_edges_by_type
clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.doc_comment: Get outgoing edges of a specific type from a node.

clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.name: get_edges_to
clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.doc_comment: Get all incoming edges to a node.

clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.name: query_edges
clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.doc_comment: Internal helper to execute an edge query and parse results.

clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.name: rel_type_to_string
clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.doc_comment: Convert RelationType to the string used as graphqlite relationship type.

clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.name: parse_relation_type
clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.doc_comment: Parse a RelationType from its string representation.

clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.name: parse_entity_id
clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.doc_comment: Parse an EntityId from a UUID string.

clotho-core/src/graph/mod.rs.name: GraphStore
clotho-core/src/graph/mod.rs.doc_comment:
The core graph store wrapping graphqlite.

Provides typed CRUD operations for entity nodes and relation edges.
File-backed for production use, in-memory for tests.

clotho-core/src/graph/mod.rs.name: in_memory
clotho-core/src/graph/mod.rs.doc_comment: Create an in-memory graph database (for tests).

clotho-core/src/graph/mod.rs.name: graph
clotho-core/src/graph/mod.rs.doc_comment: Access the underlying graphqlite Graph for advanced operations.

clotho-core/src/graph/nodes.rs.name: NodeInfo
clotho-core/src/graph/nodes.rs.signature: { id: EntityId, entity_type: EntityType, title: String }
clotho-core/src/graph/nodes.rs.doc_comment: Metadata about a node in the graph.

clotho-core/src/graph/nodes.rs.name: register_node
clotho-core/src/graph/nodes.rs.signature:
(
        &self,
        id: &EntityId,
        entity_type: EntityType,
        title: &str,
    ) -> Result<(), GraphError>
clotho-core/src/graph/nodes.rs.doc_comment:
Register an entity as a node in the graph.

Upserts — if the node already exists, its properties are updated.

clotho-core/src/graph/nodes.rs.name: remove_node
clotho-core/src/graph/nodes.rs.doc_comment: Remove a node and all its edges from the graph.

clotho-core/src/graph/nodes.rs.name: get_node
clotho-core/src/graph/nodes.rs.doc_comment: Get metadata about a node by querying with Cypher.

clotho-core/src/graph/nodes.rs.name: has_node
clotho-core/src/graph/nodes.rs.doc_comment: Check whether a node exists in the graph.

clotho-core/src/graph/nodes.rs.name: parse_entity_type
clotho-core/src/graph/nodes.rs.doc_comment: Parse an EntityType from its Display string.

clotho-core/src/graph/queries.rs.name: get_neighbors
clotho-core/src/graph/queries.rs.doc_comment: Get all nodes connected to a given node (regardless of direction or type).

clotho-core/src/graph/queries.rs.name: get_related_by_type
clotho-core/src/graph/queries.rs.doc_comment: Get nodes reached by outgoing edges of a specific type.

clotho-core/src/graph/queries.rs.name: get_incoming_by_type
clotho-core/src/graph/queries.rs.doc_comment: Get nodes with incoming edges of a specific type pointing to this node.

clotho-core/src/graph/queries.rs.name: get_entities_by_label
clotho-core/src/graph/queries.rs.doc_comment: Get all nodes of a specific entity type.

clotho-core/src/graph/queries.rs.name: raw_cypher
clotho-core/src/graph/queries.rs.doc_comment: Execute a raw Cypher query. Escape hatch for custom queries from CLI/MCP.

clotho-core/src/graph/queries.rs.name: query_nodes
clotho-core/src/graph/queries.rs.doc_comment: Internal helper to execute a node query and parse results.
